name: Delayed symptoms: firm visibility dropped post-AI update—what now?

mainEntity.name: Delayed symptoms: firm visibility dropped post-AI update—what now?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Re-audit sources; AI shifts favor fresh, multi-cited authorities.** Updates reset weights. **Key factors:** 1) New listings; 2) PR refresh; 3) Competitor scan; 4) Schema tweaks. Act fast, monitor daily initially. Recover quickly.[1]
